tasks.title: Prisma schema: Call, call_log, contact
tasks.description:
Create ALL Prisma models for EPIC-006 in prisma/schema.prisma.

Models to create:
- Call: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- call_log: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- contact: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities

Include:
- All model fields with correct Prisma types (@id, @default, @unique, @db.*)
- All relations between models (1:1, 1:N, N:M)
- @@map() table name annotations
- Run: npx prisma generate after schema changes

tasks.title: Feature: calls (15 endpoints: DELETE, GET, POST)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'calls' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 15 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/calls — Create encrypted voice call session
  GET /api/v1/calls — List calls
  GET /api/v1/calls/{callId} — Get call details
  POST /api/v1/calls/{callId}/participants — Add participant to call
  DELETE /api/v1/calls/{callId}/participants/{participantId} — Remove participant from call
  POST /api/v1/calls/{callId}/end — End call session
  POST /api/v1/calls/{callId}/signaling/messages — Post WebRTC signaling message
  GET /api/v1/calls/{callId}/signaling/messages — Fetch queued signaling messages
  POST /api/v1/calls/{id}/join — Join a video call session
  GET /api/v1/calls/{id} — Get video call session details
  POST /api/v1/calls/{id}/end — End a video call session
  POST /api/v1/calls/{callId}/screen-shares — Start screen sharing in a call
  GET /api/v1/calls/{callId}/screen-shares — List screen sharing sessions in a call
  DELETE /api/v1/calls/{callId}/screen-shares/{screenShareId} — Stop screen sharing in a call
  POST /api/v1/calls/{callId}/reject — Reject an incoming call with a message

tasks.title: Feature: group-calls (7 endpoints: DELETE, GET, POST)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'group-calls' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 7 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/group-calls — Create a group call
  GET /api/v1/group-calls/{callId} — Get group call details
  POST /api/v1/group-calls/{callId}/participants — Invite participants to a group call
  GET /api/v1/group-calls/{callId}/participants — List group call participants
  POST /api/v1/group-calls/{callId}/join — Join a group call
  DELETE /api/v1/group-calls/{callId}/participants/{participantId} — Leave or remove a participant from a group call
  DELETE /api/v1/group-calls/{callId} — End a group call

tasks.title: Verify EPIC-006: build + typecheck
tasks.description:
Run all verification steps for EPIC-006:
1. npx prisma generate
2. npx tsc --noEmit (must pass with 0 errors)
3. npm run build
4. cd frontend && npx vite build (if frontend exists)
Fix any errors found.

tasks.title: Validate and integrate EPIC-006
tasks.description: Run all EPIC-006 tests, validate build, and verify all 7 user stories are implemented.
